docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-16-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-16-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT'S WITNESS MATTHEW BODE SWORN AND EXAMINED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 1.00 - SERVED FEB-23-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, LISA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-16-2015 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,031.77 FILED BY LUCAS, MONICA AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, LISA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-2015 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUCAS, MONICA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NGUYEN, LISA $800.00 PRINCIPAL, $31.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $831.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, LISA
